# Glid — Health Organizer Platform

> Glid is a Ukrainian health-tech platform that helps users find doctors, book appointments, and manage their family's medical records — all in one place.

## Overview

Glid (glid.com.ua) is a digital health organizer built for the Ukrainian market. The platform connects patients with verified doctors and clinics, offering:

- Doctor search by specialty, city, and availability
- Online consultation booking
- Clinic directory with reviews and ratings
- Personal health cabinet for managing appointments and medical records
- Family health management (multiple profiles)
- Lab results tracking

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://glid-web.vercel.app/): Main landing page with service overview
- [Doctors](https://glid-web.vercel.app/likari): Search and browse doctors by specialty
- [Clinics](https://glid-web.vercel.app/kliniky): Browse medical clinics and facilities
- [Online Consultations](https://glid-web.vercel.app/onlayn-konsultaciyi): Book video consultations
- [About Us](https://glid-web.vercel.app/pro-nas): Company mission and team
- [About the App](https://glid-web.vercel.app/pro-zastosunok): Mobile app features (iOS & Android)
- [Blog](https://glid-web.vercel.app/blog): Health articles and medical advice

## Medical Specialties Available

General Practice, Pediatrics, Dermatology, Cardiology, Neurology, Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT (Otolaryngology), Urology, Endocrinology, Orthopedics, Psychiatry, Dentistry, Gastroenterology, Pulmonology, Allergology, and more.

## Technology

- Built with Next.js (App Router), deployed on Vercel
- Ukrainian language (uk-UA) as primary
- Mobile-first responsive design
- REST API backend on AWS

## Contact

- Website: https://glid-web.vercel.app
- Language: Ukrainian (uk)
- Market: Ukraine
